The '''''Veltraa''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] under the command of [[Dallan Morvis]] in service during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. It was named to honor the service of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jimas Veltraa]] to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="KOTOR 31" />

Under [[Dallan Morvis]]' command, which was his first, the ''Veltraa'' participated in a defense formation around [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] aimed at preventing [[Zayne Carrick]] from landing on the world. The ship, along with all the other [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]] in the formation formed the [[Vanjervalis Chain]], having their tactical and drive systems slaved to the [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] [[Swiftsure (Inexpugnable-class)|''Swiftsure'']].<ref name="KOTOR 31" />
